error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key or token. Please check your credentials.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect. Check the address and network connection.
error.no_printers: No printers found on this account.
error.printer_not_found: Selected printer could not be found.

user.title: Prusa Connect
user.description: Choose how to connect to your Prusa printer.

local.title: PrusaLink (Local Connection)
local.description: Connect directly to your printer on the local network. Find the API key in your printer's PrusaLink web interface under Settings.

cloud.title: Prusa Connect (Cloud)
cloud.description: Connect via Prusa Connect cloud service. You'll need a Bearer token from [{prusa_connect_url}]({prusa_connect_url}).

select_printer.title: Select Printer
select_printer.description: Choose which printer to add to Home Assistant.
